title: Red Dark
description: Red Dark a darkmode with a red touch
body:
# 🟥 Red Dark

## Vanilla-Style Dark GUI Resource Pack

**Red Dark** is a vanilla-friendly resource pack that redesigns Minecraft’s entire GUI with a **dark theme**.  
Black is used as the main color, while **red accents** highlight important elements — clean, readable, and stylish.

The original Minecraft pixel style is fully preserved, so everything still feels **100% vanilla**.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🖤 Dark GUI with **black as the main color**
- 🔴 Red accents for highlights and UI details
- 📦 Redesigned **inventory, hotbar, and all containers**
- 📜 Reworked **menus** (pause menu, settings, title screen, etc.)
- ❤️ Clean and readable **HUD**
- 🧱 **Vanilla pixel style preserved**
- 🗡️ Selected **items retextured** to match the Red Dark theme

---

## 🎮 Vanilla Friendly

- No HD textures
- No realism
- No visual clutter

Red Dark stays as close to vanilla as possible while giving Minecraft a modern dark UI.

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility

- **Minecraft Java Edition**
- **Versions:** 1.20 – Latest
- Works in **pure vanilla**
- ❌ No OptiFine required  
- ❌ No Sodium required  
- ❌ No mods required  

Just install and play.

---

## 📌 Notes

- This pack focuses mainly on the **GUI**
- Designed for **Survival, Creative, and Multiplayer**
